description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions CI workflow that builds and tests the aws-iot-device-sdk-cpp-v2 package across multiple environments. The workflow should trigger on push to all branches except main. It should include jobs for Linux compatibility, compiler compatibility, BYO crypto, and no CPU extensions on Linux, as well as separate jobs for Windows and macOS. Each job should use a specific runner, download a builder script, and execute it to build the package with various configurations.
